findings.title: Implement Real-Time Co-Editing Feature
findings.description: Develop a real-time co-editing feature that allows multiple users to edit documents simultaneously, addressing the critical need identified by enterprise customers.
assumptions: Users need to collaborate in real-time to enhance productivity.

evidence.excerpt: Competitor launched real-time co-editing — we need parity.

recommendations: Accelerate the development of real-time co-editing features.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a document is open for editing WHEN multiple users access the document THEN all users can edit simultaneously without locking.

findings.title: Revise Document Locking Mechanism
findings.description: Redesign the document locking mechanism to eliminate user frustration caused by the current model, allowing for smoother collaboration.
assumptions: Users are frustrated with the current locking mechanism.

evidence.excerpt: Current document locking causes user frustration.

recommendations: Implement a more user-friendly locking mechanism.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a document is being edited WHEN another user attempts to access it THEN they are notified of the current editing status without being locked out.

findings.title: Add Presence Indicators
findings.description: Introduce presence indicators to show who is currently viewing or editing a document, enhancing collaboration efficiency.
assumptions: Users need visibility into who is collaborating on documents.
recommendations: Implement real-time presence avatars in the document header.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN multiple users are accessing a document WHEN they are viewing or editing THEN their presence is indicated by avatars in the document header.

findings.title: Implement Conflict Resolution Strategy
findings.description: Establish a conflict resolution strategy for concurrent edits to prevent data loss and ensure user changes are preserved.
assumptions: Users need a reliable way to handle concurrent edits.
recommendations: Evaluate and implement a conflict resolution strategy like Operational Transformation or CRDTs.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN two users are editing the same document WHEN they make conflicting changes THEN the system resolves the conflict according to the chosen strategy without data loss.

findings.title: Enhance Mobile Editing Experience
findings.description: Improve the mobile editing experience to support real-time collaboration and ensure it is on par with desktop functionality.
assumptions: Mobile users require a seamless editing experience.
recommendations: Implement WebSocket support for real-time collaboration on mobile.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is editing on mobile WHEN they access a document THEN they can collaborate in real-time with other users without issues.

findings.title: Collect User Feedback on Collaboration Features
findings.description: Establish a mechanism to gather user feedback specifically on the new collaboration features to ensure they meet user needs.
assumptions: User feedback is essential for feature improvement.

evidence.excerpt: Measurement Gap: User Feedback on Collaboration Features.

recommendations: Implement user feedback surveys and analytics tracking.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN new collaboration features are launched WHEN users interact with them THEN feedback is collected through surveys and analytics.
metadata.story_title: Collect User Feedback on Collaboration Features

findings.title: Conduct A/B Testing on Collaboration Features
findings.description: Perform A/B testing on different implementations of the real-time collaboration features to determine which version yields higher user engagement.
assumptions: A/B testing will provide insights into user preferences.

evidence.excerpt: Experiment Opportunity: A/B Testing Collaboration Features.

recommendations: Design and implement A/B tests for collaboration features.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN different versions of collaboration features are available WHEN users interact with them THEN engagement metrics are collected and analyzed.
metadata.story_title: Conduct A/B Testing on Collaboration Features

findings.title: Monitor Concurrent Edit Attempts
findings.description: Implement monitoring for concurrent edit attempts that are blocked to ensure the new collaboration features are functioning as intended.
assumptions: Monitoring is crucial to assess the success of the new features.

evidence.excerpt: Guardrail Metric: Concurrent Edit Attempts Blocked.

recommendations: Set up monitoring and alerting for blocked edit attempts.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new collaboration features are live WHEN concurrent edit attempts occur THEN the number of blocked attempts is tracked and reported.

findings.title: Document Real-Time Collaboration Features
findings.description: Create comprehensive documentation for the new real-time collaboration features to assist users and support teams.
assumptions: Documentation is essential for user adoption.

evidence.excerpt: Enterprise customers asking for simultaneous editing.

recommendations: Develop user guides and FAQs for the new features.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new collaboration features are launched WHEN users access the documentation THEN they can find clear instructions and support information.

findings.title: Ensure Security Compliance for Collaboration Features
findings.description: Review and ensure that the new collaboration features comply with security and data protection regulations.
assumptions: Compliance is necessary to avoid legal risks.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in 3 source(s).

recommendations: Conduct a compliance audit for the new features.

metadata.acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the new collaboration features are developed WHEN a compliance audit is conducted THEN all features meet security and data protection standards.
metadata.story_title: Ensure Security Compliance for Collaboration Features

summary: The analysis reveals a comprehensive set of requirements for implementing real-time collaboration features in CollabDocs. Key areas include simultaneous editing, improved document locking, presence indicators, conflict resolution, and enhanced mobile support. Additionally, user feedback mechanisms and compliance checks are essential for successful feature deployment.
